blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-03-03.
9,756 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-02 -> 2026-03-03)

- "Which U.S. senator will be identified as helping police remove an anti-war protester from an Armed Services subcommittee meeting by March 5, 2026?" → Tim Sheehy
- "What club will hand Manchester United interim boss Michael Carrick his first defeat by March 14, 2026?" → Newcastle United
- "Which chief executive will publicly say by March 2026 that his company is set to invest another $30bn in OpenAI and that this might be its last investment until OpenAI goes public?" → Jensen Huang
- "Which country will Volodymyr Zelenskyy say made a specific request for Ukrainian help against drones in the Middle East, by March 2026?" → United States
- "Who will the US House Oversight Committee vote to subpoena over the Justice Department's handling of Jeffrey Epstein investigation records in March 2026?" → Pam Bondi
- "Which waterway will have a cargo ship reported ablaze after being hit by an unknown projectile by March 11, 2026?" → Strait of Hormuz

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (231 resolved, 99 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
